title: Cobblemon SnomFix (AllTheMons)
description: Datapack that fixes a couple Cobblemon spawn biome configs.
body: This small datapack edits the Snowy Forest Biome tag for [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) to include vanilla and [Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/mod/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone). Without this addon Snom and Frosmoth from [AllTheMons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/allthemons) will never spawn naturally if you do not have biomes o'plenty or wyther's biomes. Added in version 1.1: also fixes Magical biome tags, to make sure Cobblemon like Solosis and Duosion have the right spawn pools.
